subcodes.title: Words to three hotel maids, spoken on 1912-10-26
subcodes.first_line: You are very welcome. Read them and ponder over them carefully, for if you are fully informed of the Cause of Bahá’u’lláh then you will witness that the teachings of Bahá’u’lláh are the cause of the illumination of the world.
subcodes.subjects: @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation
